issues.description: Effect structure incorrect. 'You may trash 1 card' should be optional (conditional), but current DSL treats trash as mandatory with thenActions. Should use conditional structure with optional:true or separate condition.

GiveDon action target is incorrect. Card text says 'Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck' – this should be SearchDeck (to add from deck), not GiveDon (which creates DON!!). The result should then be rested.
Rest target scope ambiguous. Should rest the DON!! card that was just added from deck, not Self (the played card). Target should reference the card added by SearchDeck.
